evaluation.summary: Adaptive Wasserstein weighting fails to produce consistent variance reduction as modulus size increases in high-order primorial bases
next_directions: Investigate alternative adaptive weighting functions that better capture distributional changes in sparse coprime residue classes
Conduct a systematic statistical analysis with confidence intervals and replication across multiple random seeds to rule out artifacts
Explore hybrid weighting schemes combining variance and Wasserstein metrics, and test on larger primorial moduli beyond 30030
